title: Guardian Live Oversight And Review Controls
rationale: Guardian authority must remain first-class during live tutoring. This bead gives the guardian explicit review, interrupt, approve, and redirect controls over lesson-bound tutoring behavior.
focus_hint: Extend the existing guardian shell rather than inventing a parallel surface. Every control path should preserve session law and leave an auditable trace.
acceptance_criteria: Guardian shell can view live tutoring state and pending acts for the active child session
Guardian can pause, interrupt, approve, or redirect a tutoring act without widening scope
Guardian review mode cleanly transitions back into child mode when approved
Guardian controls are authoritative over automated tutoring decisions
